home.heroSubtitle: Transcending musical eras and instruments to perform works from different generations
home.bandIntro: We are an unconventional ensemble that breaks free from the constraints of time and instrumentation. From Baroque to contemporary pop, from Taiwanese folk songs to original compositions — every piece is reimagined through our unique lens.
home.eraSummary: From 1680 to 2022, spanning over 340 years of music history across 8 distinct generations.

about.title: About Us
about.missionText: Before and Beyond is an unconventional ensemble dedicated to transcending the limitations of musical eras and instruments. We breathe new life into works from different generations, creating a dialogue between the past and the present.
about.historyText: From our first performance to our latest concerts, we have continuously expanded our repertoire across centuries of music. Our journey is one of exploration — discovering how pieces from different eras speak to each other when placed side by side.

shows.title: Shows & Media
shows.eraDescription: Explore the跨度 of our repertoire — from the Baroque era to the present day. Each point represents a piece we have performed.
shows.clickToExplore: Click on any point to explore the piece
